rationale: Align configurations with spec/kibo-os-v5.md §10.5. Separates the brand-focused Herald crew (designed to lower CAC through positioning) from the telemetry drift layer (Monitor daemon), removing mixed concerns and enforcing sovereign boundaries.

herald.yaml.before: Contains alert daemon triggers: degraded_evals, safety_drift, high_cac.
herald.yaml.after: Contains brand_voice guardrails, category_content, and claim_library to drive authority and lower CAC.

monitor.yaml.after: Contains the §10.5 drift layer triggers: degraded_evals (eval_score < 4.0 -> escalate_to_human), safety_drift (boundary_violation == true -> halt_autonomy), and high_cac (cac_metric > budget_cac -> alert_marketing).
